narrative:
Union Township D (precinct in Clermont County) has 925 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points.
